text:
PTD_CNTRCT_ID_10 
PTD_CNTRCT_ID_11 
PTD_CNTRCT_ID_12 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
5 
SOURCE: 
CMS Common Medicare Environment (CME) 
VALUES: 
The first character of the contract ID is a letter or number representing the type of plan: 
E = Employer direct plan (starting January 2007) 
H = Managed care organizations other than a regional PPO (i.e., local MA-PDs, 1876 and 1833 cost 
plans, Program of All-Inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans, private fee-for-service plans, or 
demonstration
